GpuProjectExec: expr=[brand_id@0 as brand_id, brand@1 as brand, t_hour@2 as t_hour, t_minute@3 as t_minute, ext_price@4 as ext_price]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand_id@5 ASC, t_hour@2 ASC]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand_id@5 ASC, t_hour@2 ASC]
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_brand_id@1 as brand_id, i_brand@0 as brand, t_hour@2 as t_hour, t_minute@3 as t_minute, sum(tmp.ext_price)@4 as ext_price, i_brand_id@1 as i_brand_id]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, t_hour, t_minute], aggr=[sum(tmp.ext_price)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_brand@0, i_brand_id@1, t_hour@2, t_minute@3], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, t_hour, t_minute], aggr=[sum(tmp.ext_price)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(time_sk@3, t_time_sk@0)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 5, 6]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([time_sk@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405

                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=5592405

                                GpuUnionExec

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=7212
